hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path','') or d.get('path',''))" 2>/dev/null | grep -q '\.env\.local$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env.local 직접 편집은 허용되지 않습니다. .env.example을 참고하거나 환경변수를 수동으로 추가하세요.' >&2; exit 1; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path','') or d.get('path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/bart/workspace/talelapse/next-mflow && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30; fi
